did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article summarizing existing literature on the role of AI in melanoma diagnosis. It discusses AI methods such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Random Forest (RF) used in other studies, but it does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI/ML models itself. The authors explicitly state in Section 18 that they did not use AI tools for writing or editing, and the study does not involve experiments on human subjects or original data analysis using AI.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
